ddls:
CREATE TABLE "policyholders" (
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policyholder */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the policyholder */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the policyholder (e.g., male, female) */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body mass index (BMI) of the policyholder */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Number of children of the policyholder */,
  "smoker" TEXT /* Smoking habits of the policyholder (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the policyholder */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the policyholder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the policyholder */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the policyholder */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the policyholder */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Significant medical history of the policyholder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policyholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependents" (
  "dependent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependent */,
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policyholder the dependent belongs to */,
  "dependent_name" TEXT /* Name of the dependent */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the dependent */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the dependent (e.g., male, female) */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the dependent to the policyholder (e.g., spouse, child) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the dependent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the dependent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the dependent */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Significant medical history of the dependent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependents_policyholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("policyholder_id") REFERENCES policyholders ("policyholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policyholder the record belongs to */,
  "dependent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent the record belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "health_issue" TEXT /* Description of the health issue */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment_details" TEXT /* Details of the treatment received */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital where the treatment was received */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Name of the doctor who provided the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_dependent_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_id") REFERENCES dependents ("dependent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_policyholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("policyholder_id") REFERENCES policyholders ("policyholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policyholder the policy belongs to */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy (e.g., health, life) */,
  "premium" REAL /* Premium amount of the policy */,
  "coverage" TEXT /* Coverage details of the policy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the policy */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the policy */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., active, expired, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_policyholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("policyholder_id") REFERENCES policyholders ("policyholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy the claim belongs to */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was made */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount of the claim */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "reason_for_rejection" TEXT /* Reason for claim rejection (if applicable) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of the region */,
  "healthcare_facilities" INTEGER /* Number of healthcare facilities in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policyholder_regions" (
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policyholder */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the policyholder resides in */,
  "move_date" TEXT /* Date the policyholder moved to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policyholder_id", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "administrator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Specific role of the administrator (e.g., manager, supervisor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the administrator belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administrator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specific area of specialization of the analyst */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the agent */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policyholder_agents" (
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policyholder */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent the policyholder is associated with */,
  "association_date" TEXT /* Date the policyholder was associated with the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policyholder_id", "agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policyholder the inspection belongs to */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date the inspection was conducted */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector who conducted the inspection */,
  "inspection_details" TEXT /* Detailed notes from the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_policyholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("policyholder_id") REFERENCES policyholders ("policyholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint */,
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policyholder the complaint belongs to */,
  "complaint_date" TEXT /* Date the complaint was filed */,
  "complaint_details" TEXT /* Details of the complaint */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the complaint (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  "resolution_details" TEXT /* Details of how the complaint was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_policyholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("policyholder_id") REFERENCES policyholders ("policyholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy the review belongs to */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given in the review (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policyholder_reviews" (
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policyholder */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the policyholder wrote */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policyholder_id", "review_id")
)
